geographic_restrictions: No strict geographic restrictions; applicable globally with emphasis on regions with endangered languages or diverse linguistic communities.
project_area: Bilingual education programs, language revitalization, and cultural preservation through education.
demographic_requirements: Targeted at students, educators, and communities seeking to preserve, revitalize, or promote bilingualism and multilingualism, particularly in endangered or minority languages.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include schools, government bodies, non-profits, and community groups focused on implementing or supporting bilingual education programs. Priority may be given to projects addressing language revitalization, cultural preservation, or serving marginalized linguistic communities.
